steps.prompt: Two gates in a row — first an OR gate, then an AND gate. What do you think happens if you turn A on?
steps.feedback: First gate is on — but the lamp is still out! The signal has to travel through both gates. Turn C on too.
The lamp lights up! First the OR gate, then the AND gate — two steps to get there. Now turn C off — what happens?
Lamp goes out — the AND gate needs C. The chain broke! First gate, then second gate, then lamp — all must work.
